acceptance_criteria.text: New `artifacts` table exists with columns: id (TEXT PK nanoid), board_id (FK NOT NULL), card_id (FK NULL), filename (TEXT NOT NULL), filetype (TEXT NOT NULL, one of md/html/js/ts/sh), content (TEXT NOT NULL), position (INTEGER NOT NULL), user_id (FK NULL), created_at, updated_at. UNIQUE on (card_id, filename) for card artifacts and (board_id, filename) for board-level where card_id IS NULL. CASCADE DELETE from cards and boards. Migration in db.ts.
`takt artifact list <cardId|boardId>` lists artifacts with ID/Filename/Type/Size/Created columns. `--board` forces board-level. Respects --json, --quiet, --full-ids.

`takt artifact add` works with --file (reads from filesystem, derives name/type) and --filename+--content (inline). Validates filetype (md/html/js/ts/sh only), size (<=100KB), uniqueness. Creates activity entry. --board flag for board-level.
`takt artifact show <id>` displays metadata header + full content. Markdown gets basic terminal formatting, code files get line numbers, HTML shows raw source. --json returns content as string field.
`takt artifact edit <id>` opens $EDITOR with temp file (falls back to vi) or accepts --content for inline. Validates non-empty and <=100KB. Creates activity entry. Skips update if unchanged.
`takt artifact delete <id>` with confirmation (--yes skips). Creates activity entry. Adjusts sibling positions.
`takt artifact export <id>` writes to ./<filename> or --output path. Creates parent dirs. Errors if target exists. Prints written path.

`takt artifact run <id>` executes sh/js/ts artifacts only (error for md/html). Shows preview, requires --yes or confirmation. Passes args after `--`. Streams output, reports exit code. Creates activity entry.

API endpoints: GET/POST card artifacts, GET/PATCH/DELETE single artifact, GET/POST board-level artifacts. JWT auth + board membership. Validates filetype, size (413 for >100KB), uniqueness. Creates activity entries. Returns proper error shapes.
Existing GET /api/boards/:boardId/cards/:cardId response includes `artifacts` array (id, filename, filetype, position, created_at, updated_at — no content).

CardModal UI has Artifacts section (below checklist, above timeline): artifact list with filetype badge/size/date, expand to view content, Add Artifact form (filename+filetype dropdown+textarea), Edit/Delete buttons, confirmation dialog, empty state.
BoardView has Board Docs button in header. Opens panel listing board-level artifacts. Same add/edit/delete/view interactions. Only shown to board members.

`takt card show` includes Artifacts section (ID/Filename/Type/Size table) between checklist and timeline. `takt board show` includes Board Artifacts section after columns. Sections omitted when empty.
`takt search` and search API include artifact content and filenames in results. Matches show card ID, card title, artifact filename, and match context.

All artifact mutations (add, edit, delete, run) create activity entries with proper actions and detail JSON. Board-level artifact activity has card_id=NULL. Activity appears in card timeline and board activity feed.

current_focus: Remaining: CLI card/board show integration (AC13), search integration (AC14)
